description: Revel in the comfort of leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of mocassins from enroute. Pair them with ethno-western clothes for a fab-yet-comfy look.UpperLeather upper with a heel cup and leather bow on the toe box region for absolute durability, comfort and styleRuffled stitch detail at the seams of the toe boxSlip-on style for ease of wearLeather footbed for all-day comfortOutsolePU outsole stitched to the footbed for absolute durabilityshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
